items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Meta Jumps On Earnings, Microsoft Slumps; Tesla Pares Gain On Elon Musk Spending Plans
items.description: Tesla, Microsoft and Meta headlined huge earnings late after the stock market paused at record highs.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures rise as Tesla, Meta, Microsoft diverge after earnings
items.description: Wall Street is in the middle of Big Tech earnings, with the 'Magnificent Seven' leading moves in both directions.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures slip as Tesla, Meta, Microsoft diverge after earnings
items.description: Wall Street is in the middle of Big Tech earnings, with the 'Magnificent Seven' leading moves in both directions.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures mixed as Tesla, Meta, Microsoft diverge after earnings
items.description: Wall Street is in the middle of Big Tech earnings, with the 'Magnificent Seven' leading big moves in both directions.

items.title: Microsoft’s Earnings Surge Is Overshadowed by Data-Center Spending
items.description: Higher than anticipated capital spending and disappointing gaming results from the holiday season weighed on shares.
